name: Salesforce
description: Monitor Salesforce user access and contact data management for CRM compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Go to Salesforce > Setup > App Manager > New Connected App
2. Enable OAuth Settings
3. Set callback URL to: https://api.trycomp.ai/v1/integrations/oauth/callback
4. Add scopes: Access (api), ID (id), Offline (offline_access)
5. Copy Consumer Key (Client ID) and Secret
6. After connecting, enter your Salesforce instance URL (e.g. https://yourorg.my.salesforce.com)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Salesforce users and verifies only active users have access

checks.name: Contact Information
checks.description: Verifies Salesforce contact records are maintained
